zh.title: 币安币/美元技术分析：短期弱势震荡格局延续
zh.content:
短期走势偏弱震荡，价格持续运行在615一线均线下方，整体结构仍受空头压制。当前波动幅度收窄，高低点集中在602至608区间，显示市场进入整理阶段，方向选择尚未明确，但上行动能偏弱。

MACD指标维持负值区域运行，空头动能仍占优势，反弹缺乏持续性。价格多次尝试突破SMA20均线但均未成功，说明上方抛压较重，短期趋势仍以回调修正为主，缺乏明确反转信号。

下方支撑关注602及600整数关口，一旦跌破可能进一步下探595区域寻求支撑。上方阻力集中在608及615均线位置，只有有效站稳615上方，才有望打开新一轮上行空间。

操作上建议以区间思路应对，在未突破615之前以反弹承压为主，可逢高轻仓试空；若放量突破并站稳均线，则再考虑顺势转多，同时严格控制仓位与风险。

en.title: Binance Coin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
BNB/USD is currently exhibiting a mild short-term bearish bias after failing to sustain momentum above the 610 zone. Price action remains compressed within a tight intraday range between 602.81 and 608.15, suggesting consolidation after recent volatility. Trading below the 20-day SMA at 614.926 reinforces a weakening near-term structure. Overall trend leans sideways-to-bearish unless a decisive reclaim of the SMA occurs.

Momentum indicators reflect weakening bullish pressure, with MACD remaining in negative territory at -2.099, signaling persistent downside momentum despite the absence of RSI data. The price trading below the SMA(20) further confirms short-term bearish alignment. Lack of upward divergence suggests buyers are struggling to regain control. Until momentum stabilizes, rallies are likely to face selling pressure near resistance zones. Volatility compression suggests an impending directional move once key levels are breached.

Immediate support is observed near the recent low at 602.81, with a psychological floor forming around the 600 level, which may act as a key liquidity zone. On the upside, resistance is first seen at 608.15, followed by a stronger barrier at the 20-day SMA around 614.926. A breakout above this moving average would be required to shift sentiment back toward bullish continuation.

From a trading perspective, range-bound strategies remain favorable while price stays below the SMA(20). Short-term traders may consider selling near resistance levels around 608, while maintaining tight risk controls above 615. A sustained breakout above the 20-day SMA could justify a shift toward long positions targeting higher highs. Conversely, failure to hold 602 support increases risk of a deeper retracement toward lower psychological levels.
